---
title: "License"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Code license

All source code in this repository is licensed under the MIT License unless
otherwise noted.

A copy of the license is provided in the `LICENSE` file in the root of this
repository.

The MIT License permits reuse, modification, and distribution with attribution.

# Website and written content license

All written content, figures, and documentation on this website are licensed
under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0) license
unless otherwise noted.

This means others may share and adapt the material provided appropriate credit
is given.

For more information, see:

- [MIT License](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/mit/)
- [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)

# Citation

If you use this work, please cite the repository and associated website.

Citation information is available in the `CITATION.cff` file in the root of the
repository.

Example citation format:

> Lily Heald. *Pigmentation Genetics in Archaic Hominins: Evaluating DNA phenotyping in Neanderthal and Denisovan genomes*. GitHub repository and workflowr website, 2026.

# Third-party content

Some materials or dependencies used in this project may have separate licenses.
Please consult the relevant source documentation for details.
